message:
test(proptest): remove obsolete dataflow regression seeds

Delete proptest_dataflow.proptest-regressions containing 3 seeds that
were generated against the pre-fix BFS cycle detection logic.  The
underlying dataflow cycle detection was corrected to search from the
target node rather than the source node, making these seeds stale —
they exercised the old buggy code path that no longer exists.  Keeping
them would cause proptest to waste time replaying seeds that can no
longer fail, and the seed values (edge-case i64 values and empty text)
are already covered by the expanded proptest_dataflow suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,9 +0,0 @@
-# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
-# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
-# novel cases are generated.
-#
-# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
-# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
-cc b7739894397651eaa383ecd7d5674450e5bb6f3d4368c9d48481aa36de6bc407 # shrinks to val = 4611686018427387894
-cc 4840d288bb495de829697293193a42c88826176abb2103c0d7f29b39d4302e84 # shrinks to val = -3074457345618258604
-cc e61248ebf12930ac2fe220e62ba5516004fbcd6f613fea2d1bd9a13b2528ad84 # shrinks to val = Text("")
